hero_h1: AI, Finally Gains a Physical Body.
hero_subtext: Beyond screens and chatbots. Meet the next generation of intelligence that perceives, decides, and acts in the real world.
evo_2_desc: Machine learning applied to specific, limited tasks.
evo_3_desc: The ChatGPT Moment for the physical world. VLA (Vision-Language-Action) models enabling autonomous adaptation.
tech_1_desc: Natural language translated into joint control signals (e.g., Google RT-2, Project GR00T).
tech_2_desc: On-device AI processing within milliseconds (ms) without cloud dependency for real-time safety.
tech_3_desc: LiDAR, Vision sensors for human-like perception, paired with next-gen motors acting as synthetic muscles.
case_1_desc: Autonomous factories co-operating with Siemens & NVIDIA Omniverse.
case_2_desc: Next-gen Autonomous Mobile Robots (AMR) managing warehouses 24/7.
case_3_desc: Human-shaped robots (Tesla Optimus, Figure 01) entering the workforce.
case_4_desc: Advanced Waymo and Tesla FSD systems redefining urban transit.
future_desc: As physical AI integrates deeper into our infrastructure, we face new frontiers of technical and ethical challenges.
acc_1_desc: Shifting from data leaks to preventing physical misjudgments and unauthorized machine takeovers. Securing the physical layer is paramount.
acc_2_desc: Simulating millions of environments in virtual worlds (e.g. NVIDIA Omniverse) before physical deployment to ensure absolute safety and efficiency.
acc_3_desc: Solving the data scarcity issue in the physical world and overcoming the power/battery dilemma for heavy edge computing.
